CustomField.description: Select the GL account to map this transaction type to the associated intercompany journal entry. This GL account is used when a transaction crosses two entities in the organization. For example, if the accounting profile code is a receivable debit, this GL account maps to the payable credit on the corresponding intercompany journal entry.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the GL account to map this transaction type to the associated intercompany journal entry. This GL account is used when a transaction crosses two entities in the organization. For example, if the accounting profile code is a receivable debit, this GL account maps to the payable credit on the corresponding intercompany journal entry.
CustomField.label: Intercompany GL Account
